full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Verifying the JSON LLM disclosure format matches Part B requirements.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Does my LLM disclosure JSON include task_tag, code_used_verbatim, and student_modification fields for each interaction?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed all required fields were present; suggested adding explicit false for code_used_verbatim even when N/A.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Reviewed all JSON files and confirmed all required fields present.
